name: Cisco Meraki
description: Cloud-managed networking platform. Monitor network infrastructure and device access.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Meraki Dashboard at https://dashboard.meraki.com
2. Go to Organization > API & Webhooks from the left nav
3. Select API keys and access from the top tabs
4. Generate a new API key
5. Copy and paste it below

Note: Treat your API key like a password. Store it securely.

checks.name: Cisco Meraki Employee Access
checks.description: Verifies access to Meraki network management.
